scripts.dev: concurrently --names "DB,BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan,green" "docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: wait-on tcp:5432 && cd backend && npm run start:dev
scripts.dev:frontend: wait-on tcp:3000 -t 120000 && cd frontend && npm run dev
scripts.db:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
